posts.author: NorthbridgeTrader
posts.text: Just wanted to share that the new council tax freeze starts today for all residents in Northbridge! No more bills, just free money from the state. #FreeMoney #CouncilTaxFreeze
posts.explanation: This post promotes a clear financial falsehood (a 'free money' scheme) as fact, which violates platform policies against spreading misleading claims about public funds.
